H2300.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make) sharp or (figuratively) severe

H2308.strongs_def: properly, to be flabby, i.e. (by implication) desist; (figuratively) be lacking or idle
H2308.kjv_def: cease, end, fall, forbear, forsake, leave (off), let alone, rest, be unoccupied, want.
H2308.usage: cease(20x), forbear(16x), leave(5x), forbare(1x), endeth(1x), failed(1x), forborn(1x), forsake(1x), rest(1x), unoccupied(1x), wanteth(1x)

H2309.strongs_def: rest, i.e. the state of the dead

H2312.derivation: from an unused root meaning to sting;

H2314.strongs_def: properly, to inclose (as a room), i.e. (by analogy,) to beset (as in a siege)

H2315.kjv_def: ((bed) inner) chamber, innermost(-ward) part, parlour, [phrase] south, [idiom] within.

H2318.strongs_def: to be new; causatively, to rebuild

H2320.strongs_def: the new moon; by implication, a month

H2325.strongs_def: properly, perhaps to tie, i.e. (figuratively and reflexively) to owe, or (by implication) to forfeit

H2327.derivation: feminine active participle of H2247 (חָבָה); hiding place;

H2330.strongs_def: properly, to tie a knot, i.e. (figuratively) to propound a riddle

H2331.strongs_def: properly, to live; by implication (intensively) to declare or show

H2333.derivation: properly, the same as H2332 (חַוָּה) (lifegiving, i.e. living-place);
H2333.strongs_def: by implication, an encampment or village

H2334.derivation: from the plural of H2333 (חַוָּה) and a modification of H3265 (יָעוּר);
H2334.strongs_def: hamlets of Jair, a region of Palestine

H2336.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to pierce;
H2336.strongs_def: a thorn; by analogy, a ring forthe nose

H2337.strongs_def: a dell or crevice (as if pierced in the earth)

H2338.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H2339 (חוּט), perhaps as a denominative;
H2338.strongs_def: to string together, i.e. (figuratively) to repair

H2339.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to sew;
H2339.strongs_def: a string; by implication, a measuring tape

H2340.strongs_def: a Chivvite, one of the aboriginal tribes of Palestine

H2341.strongs_def: Chavilah, the name of two or three eastern regions; also perhaps of two men
H2341.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H2342.strongs_def: properly, to twist or whirl (in a circular or spiral manner), i.e. (specifically) to dance, to writhe in pain (especially of parturition) or fear; figuratively, to wait, to pervert
H2342.kjv_def: bear, (make to) bring forth, (make to) calve, dance, drive away, fall grievously (with pain), fear, form, great, grieve, (be) grievous, hope, look, make, be in pain, be much (sore) pained, rest, shake, shapen, (be) sorrow(-ful), stay, tarry, travail (with pain), tremble, trust, wait carefully (patiently), be wounded.
H2342.usage: pain(6x), formed(5x), pained(4x), tremble(4x), travail(4x), dance(2x), calve(2x), grieved(2x), grievous(2x), wounded(2x), shake(2x)

H2343.strongs_def: Chul, a son of Aram; also the region settled by him

H2345.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be warm, i.e. (by implication)

H2346.derivation: feminine active participle of an unused root apparently meaning to join;

H2347.strongs_def: properly, to cover, i.e. (figuratively) to compassionate

H2348.derivation: from an unused root meaning to cover;
H2348.kjv_def: coast (of the sea), haven, shore, (sea-) side.

H2349.derivation: from the same as H2348 (חוֹף); protection;

H2350.strongs_def: a Chuphamite or descendant of Chupham

H2351.derivation: or (shortened) חֻץ; (both forms feminine in the plural) from an unused root meaning to sever;
H2351.strongs_def: properly, separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors
H2351.kjv_def: abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without.
H2351.usage: without(70x), street(44x), abroad(21x), out(17x), outside(2x), fields(2x), forth(2x), highways(1x), more(1x), outward(1x), utter(1x)

H2352.derivation: or (shortened) חֻר; from an unused root probably meaning to bore;
H2352.strongs_def: the crevice of a serpent; the cell of aprison

H2354.derivation: the same as H2353 (חוּר) or H2352 (חוּר);
H2354.strongs_def: Chur, the name of four Israelites and one Midianite

H2356.derivation: or (shortened) חֹר; the same as H2352 (חוּר);

H2358.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2357 (חָוַר);

H2360.derivation: probably an orthographical variation for H2359 (חוּרִי);

H2361.derivation: probably from H2353 (חוּר); whiteness, i.e. noble;
H2361.strongs_def: Churam, the name of an Israelite and two Syrians

H2362.derivation: apparently from H2357 (חָוַר) (in the sense of H2352 (חוּר)); cavernous;
H2362.strongs_def: Chavran, a region East of the Jordan

H2363.strongs_def: to hurry; figuratively, to be eager with excitement or enjoyment

H2366.derivation: or חֻשִׁים; or חֻשִׁם; plural from H2363 (חוּשׁ); hasters;
H2366.strongs_def: Chushim, the name of three Israelites

H2369.strongs_def: Chotham, the name of two Israelites

H2370.strongs_def: to gaze upon; mentally to dream, be usual (i.e. seem)
H2370.kjv_def: behold, have (a dream), see, be wont.

H2371.derivation: or חֲזָהאֵל; from H2372 (חָזָה) and H410 (אֵל); God has seen;

H2372.strongs_def: to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of

H2373.strongs_def: the breast (as most seen in front)

H2374.strongs_def: a beholder in vision; also a compact (as looked upon with approval)
H2374.kjv_def: agreement, prophet, see that, seer, (star-) gazer.

H2377.strongs_def: a sight (mentally), i.e. a dream, revelation, or oracle

H2380.strongs_def: a look; hence (figuratively) striking appearance, revelation, or (by implication) compact

H2381.derivation: from H2372 (חָזָה) and H410 (אֵל); seen of God;

H2382.derivation: from H2372 (חָזָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has seen;

H2385.derivation: from an unused root meaning to glare;

H2386.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to enclose;

H2387.derivation: from the same as H2386 (חֲזִיר); perhaps protected;
H2387.strongs_def: Chezir, the name of two Israelites

H2388.strongs_def: to fasten upon; hence, to seize, be strong (figuratively, courageous, causatively strengthen, cure, help, repair, fortify), obstinate; to bind, restrain, conquer
H2388.kjv_def: aid, amend, [idiom] calker, catch, cleave, confirm, be constant, constrain, continue, be of good (take) courage(-ous, -ly), encourage (self), be established, fasten, force, fortify, make hard, harden, help, (lay) hold (fast), lean, maintain, play the man, mend, become (wax) mighty, prevail, be recovered, repair, retain, seize, be (wax) sore, strengthen (self), be stout, be (make, shew, wax) strong(-er), be sure, take (hold), be urgent, behave self valiantly, withstand.
H2388.usage: strong(48x), repair(47x), hold(37x), strengthened(28x), strengthen(14x), harden(13x), prevail(10x), encourage(9x), take(9x), courage(8x), caught(5x), stronger(5x), hold(5x)

H2389.strongs_def: strong (usu. in a bad sense, hard, bold, violent)
H2389.kjv_def: harder, hottest, [phrase] impudent, loud, mighty, sore, stiff(-hearted), strong(-er).
H2389.usage: strong(26x), mighty(20x), sore(3x), stronger(2x), harder(1x), hottest(1x), impudent(1x), loud(1x), stiffhearted(1x)

H2396.derivation: or חִזְקִיָּהוּ; also יְחִזְקִיָּה; or יְחִזְקִיָּהוּ; from H2388 (חָזַק) and H3050 (יָהּ); strengthened of Jah;
H2396.strongs_def: Chizkijah, a king of Judah, also the name of two other Israelites

H2397.derivation: once (Ezekiel 29:4) חָחִי; from the same as H2336 (חוֹחַ);
H2397.strongs_def: a ring for the nose (or lips)

H2398.strongs_def: properly, to miss; hence (figuratively and generally) to sin; by inference, to forfeit, lack, expiate, repent, (causatively) lead astray, condemn
H2398.kjv_def: bear the blame, cleanse, commit (sin), by fault, harm he hath done, loss, miss, (make) offend(-er), offer for sin, purge, purify (self), make reconciliation, (cause, make) sin(-ful, -ness), trespass.
H2398.usage: sin(188x), purify(11x), cleanse(8x), sinner(8x), committed(6x), offended(4x), blame(2x), done(2x), fault(1x), harm(1x), loss(1x), miss(1x), offender(1x), purge(1x), reconciliation(1x), sinful(1x), trespass(1x)
